messages.text:
Sure! Here’s a simple code snippet to blink an LED on an ESP32 using the Arduino framework:

```cpp
#define LED_BUILTIN 2 // Define the LED pin

void setup() {
    pinMode(LED_BUILTIN, OUTPUT); // Initialize the LED pin as an output
}

void loop() {
    digitalWrite(LED_BUILTIN, HIGH); // Turn the LED on
    delay(1000);                     // Wait for a second
    digitalWrite(LED_BUILTIN, LOW);  // Turn the LED off
    delay(1000);                     // Wait for a second
}
```

Just upload this code to your ESP32, and the built-in LED should start blinking! Let me know if you need more details or further explanation.
